plan.description: 规划阶段 - 需求分析、架构设计、任务拆分

skills.name: gsd-discuss-phase
skills.description: 在规划前通过自适应提问收集阶段上下文
skills.use_when: 开始新阶段前收集需求

skills.name: gsd-spec-phase
skills.description: 通过模糊度评分澄清阶段交付内容
skills.use_when: 需要明确阶段目标和交付物

skills.name: gsd-plan-phase
skills.description: 创建带验证循环的详细阶段计划
skills.use_when: 需要创建详细的工作计划

skills.name: gsd-explore
skills.description: 通过苏格拉底式探索推进创意

skills.name: gsd-mvp-phase
skills.description: 将阶段规划为垂直 MVP 切片
skills.use_when: 需要最小化范围快速验证

skills.name: gsd-map-codebase
skills.description: 使用并行 mapper agent 分析代码库
skills.use_when: 需要理解现有代码结构

skills.name: gsd-ingest-docs
skills.description: 从现有文档引导创建 .planning/ 结构
skills.use_when: 项目有现有文档需要整合

implement.description: 实现阶段 - 编码、测试、集成

skills.name: gsd-execute-phase
skills.description: 以分波并行方式执行某阶段的全部计划

skills.name: gsd-fast
skills.description: 内联执行琐碎任务

skills.name: gsd-capture
skills.description: 捕获想法、任务、笔记和种子
skills.use_when: 发现新需求或问题时记录

skills.name: commit-message
skills.description: 生成中文 Conventional Commits 提交消息

skills.name: gsd-add-tests
skills.description: 根据 UAT 标准生成测试

skills.name: gsd-docs-update
skills.description: 生成或更新项目文档

verify.description: 验证阶段 - 代码审查、测试、安全审计

skills.name: gsd-code-review
skills.description: 审查源码文件中的缺陷、安全问题

skills.name: gsd-audit-fix
skills.description: 自主审计到修复流水线

skills.name: gsd-secure-phase
skills.description: 核验已完成阶段的威胁缓解措施

skills.name: gsd-validate-phase
skills.description: 审计并补齐验证缺口

skills.name: gsd-verify-work
skills.description: 通过对话式 UAT 验证功能

skills.name: gsd-ui-review
skills.description: 对前端代码执行视觉审计

debug.description: 调试阶段 - 问题诊断、修复

skills.name: gsd-debug
skills.description: 通过持久化状态进行系统化调试

skills.name: gsd-forensics
skills.description: 对失败的工作流进行事后取证

skills.name: gsd-health
skills.description: 诊断 planning 目录健康状况

manage.description: 管理阶段 - 项目管理、里程碑

skills.name: gsd-progress
skills.description: 检查进度、推进工作流

skills.name: gsd-manager
skills.description: 交互式管理多个阶段

skills.name: gsd-milestone-summary
skills.description: 生成项目总结

skills.name: gsd-complete-milestone
skills.description: 归档里程碑并准备下一版本

skills.name: gsd-ship
skills.description: 创建 PR 并准备合并

memory.description: 记忆管理 - 知识库、工作记忆

skills.name: distill-memory
skills.description: 捕获突破性时刻和有价值的洞察

skills.name: search-memory
skills.description: 搜索个人知识库

skills.name: read-working-memory
skills.description: 读取每日工作记忆简报

skills.name: save-handoff
skills.description: 保存简洁的交接摘要
